title: State Street launches GENIUS Act-aligned money market fund for stablecoin reserves
summary: The launch comes amid growing competition among financial institutions to manage assets backing dollar-pegged stablecoins.

title: Ripple targets Africa’s booming remittance market with Flutterwave investment
summary: Ripple’s investment in Flutterwave will bring RLUSD, Ripple Payments and XRPL to one of Africa’s largest fintechs as blockchain remittances gain traction.

title: Aluminum Rises as Traders Weigh Chinese Output, Mideast Supply
summary: Aluminum edged higher as investors assessed the potential for long-term supply limitations despite booming Chinese production and the possible return of Middle East smelters to the global market.

title: IG4 Offers to Buy Raizen Debt in Quest for Majority Stake
summary: Private equity firm IG4 Capital, fresh off a deal to take control of petrochemical giant Braskem SA, is now setting its sights on sugar and ethanol producer Raizen SA, another major Brazilian company in distress.

title: Binance Reportedly Faces European Union Exit as MiCA License Bid Nears Rejection
summary:

Binance could reportedly be forced to exit the European Union as Greece is poised to reject its MiCA license application.

title: SpaceX Shares Hit New High as Elon Musk's Firm Agrees to Acquire AI Startup Cursor for $60 Billion
summary: The all-stock deal would make Cursor a wholly owned SpaceX subsidiary and deepen the company's push into AI following its blockbuster IPO.

summary: Real-world case studies show how the best crypto swap APIs help wallets, aggregators, and protocols improve onboarding and retention.

title: Squid adds Ripple’s RLUSD stablecoin for cross-chain swaps
summary: Cross-chain platform Squid has integrated Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin, allowing users to swap into and out of RLUSD across chains and assets.

title: Bitcoin DeFi demand concentrated in small-but-deep pockets, Rootstock exec says
summary: DeFi liquidity is down, with total value locked dropping from roughly $180 billion to $70 billion in less than a year.
